<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Add Message"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/api/sessions/{session_id}/messages"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Add a message to a session.

Also touches the session (updated_at + message_count++) and mirrors to JSONL.

  id={"request"}
